summary: The implementation successfully adds an UpcomingAttractionsSection component with timeline-based display (2027-2029), includes all requested attractions (Starr Eyes, Lone Starr, Chaos Breaths land with Fire over Water and Dragon Lair shows, Under the Sea), integrates the section into App.tsx, and implements image loading from /assets/generated with error handling. All requirements appear to be implemented based on the available diff evidence.
